description: Get the status and access statistics of a viewing grant.

main.description: Returns whether a grant is active, its expiry, and access count. Caller must be the grant subject or grantee.

errors.name: Forbidden
errors.description: Caller is not the grant subject or grantee.

active.description: Whether the grant is currently active and not expired.

expiresAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the grant expires.

accessCount.description: Total number of times the grant has been redeemed.

lastAccessedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last access, or null.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the grant was created.
